promoted_facts.fact: Related party expenses: $802K royalties + $552K management fees paid to Mondofix Inc. (21% of total revenue)
91+ day AR is $304,634 (32.9% of gross AR), indicating collection challenges with some franchisees
Products purchased from Novus 2 LLC (affiliate): $82K COGS in 2024
Federal statutory tax rate is 23.47%; effective rate 27.6% in 2024 due to $46K 'other' adjustments
Capital contribution of $100K receivable from parent at 12/31/2024, received 3/27/2025
promoted_facts.source: Financial notes Note 6 and Note 10, pages 105, 108

promoted_facts.fact: Initial franchise fees deferred and recognized over license term (ASC 606)
AI restriction clause: explicit prohibition on using confidential info with ML, AI, or generative AI platforms
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass D / Item 14, page 54
Reader report Pass E / Item 17, page 61

promoted_facts.fact: Post-term holdover royalty surcharge of $200/month if operating past term without re-franchising
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass B / Item 6 note (4), page 24
